betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Industrial Boiler§f heats water into steam or heats oil for refining.

§eTask:§f Craft 1x §bIndustrial Boiler§f

§eCapacities:§f
• §b64,000 mB§f input tank
• Water → Steam at §e1:10 ratio§f (1000 mB water = 10,000 mB steam)
• §aDoes NOT explode§f when output is full (unlike standard boiler)

§eSetup:§f
• Place boiler on top of a heat source:
  - §bFirebox§f - Solid fuels (coal, wood)
  - §bFluid Burner§f - Liquid fuels (diesel, kerosene)
  - §bElectric Heater§f - Uses HE power
• Heat transfer based on temperature difference (ΔT × 0.01 TU/t)
• Right-click with fluid item to switch between water/oil heating

§eFunctions:§f
1. §bSteam Production§f - For turbines and power generation
2. §bOil Heating§f - Heat crude oil for refinery input

§aTip:§f Essential for both power generation AND oil processing chains.
